payload.title: test: startTestServer().close() leaks the mgr.attach() fs.watch watcher
payload.description:
`startTestServer().close()` in `test/helpers.js` calls `server.close()` and
`scope.cleanup()` (which closes the db and removes the tmpdir) but never
`mgr.detach()` / closes the `fs.watch` watcher that `mgr.attach()` created. The
watcher is left open on a now-deleted temp scope dir for every server-backed
test — a leaked file handle + live watcher per run.

Surfaced during the SCP-103 search review (pre-existing teardown asymmetry in
the shared helper, not search-specific).

Fix: in `close()`, detach the workspace (or explicitly close the watcher) before
`scope.cleanup()`.
